description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named builder that runs on a schedule, on release creation, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow checks out a repository with submodules, installs Qt, builds the project with CMake, and uploads the resulting packages as a pre-release to GitHub Releases. Run the build and upload steps for Ubuntu 20.04, 22.04, and 24.04, as well as for Windows 32-bit and 64-bit.
